steps.title: Set up equations from the two points
steps.content:
Since $f(x) = ax - b$ passes through $(c, 7)$ and $(2c, 117)$, substitute each point into the function:

From $(c, 7)$: $$f(c) = ac - b = 7$$
From $(2c, 117)$: $$f(2c) = 2ac - b = 117$$

steps.title: Eliminate $b$ by subtracting the equations
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second to eliminate $-b$:
$$(2ac - b) - (ac - b) = 117 - 7$$
$$ac = 110$$

steps.title: Solve for $b$
steps.content:
Substitute $ac = 110$ back into the first equation:
$$110 - b = 7$$
$$b = 103$$
